entities.name: Triangulation

entities.name: Truth in professional assessment
entities.context: V's belief that valid professional data requires consistency across three disparate planes

entities.context: One of three planes for professional assessment; prone to ego bias

entities.name: External validation
entities.context: One of three planes for professional assessment; prone to limited observation bias

entities.name: Truth engine

entities.name: Trust score

entities.name: Matching algorithms

entities.name: Consensus algorithms
